assertions.title: Add creates tension with desired and actual

steps.expected: Creates Active tension with ULID, correct fields, and creation mutation
steps.observed: ✓ Created tension 01KJJH88CGTH12REE26SG6ZDAQ with desired='write novel', actual='have outline', status=Active

steps.expected: Shows tension with all fields correct
steps.observed: Tension displayed with correct desired, actual, status, creation timestamp, and 1 mutation

evidence.stdout: Created tension with ULID, verified via show command

steps.expected: Creates child with parent_id set to parent ID
JSON shows parent_id field set correctly

evidence.stdout: Parent created, child created with parent reference, JSON verified parent_id field

assertions.title: Add rejects empty desired or actual

steps.observed: error: desired state cannot be empty, exit code 1
error: actual state cannot be empty, exit code 1
error: actual state is required: werk add <desired> <actual>, exit code 1

evidence.stderr: Clear error messages for each validation failure

steps.expected: Creates tension with exact CJK and emoji preserved
steps.observed: Created tension 01KJJH8YEDA11GX44BP6FJ66JX with desired='写小说 🎵', actual='有大纲'
Desired: 写小说 🎵, Actual: 有大纲 - exactly as input

evidence.stdout: Unicode characters preserved exactly through add and show

assertions.title: Show displays tension by ID or prefix

evidence.stdout: Both full ID and 8-char prefix resolved to same tension

steps.expected: Error listing all matching tensions with IDs and desired states
steps.observed: error: ambiguous prefix '01KJ' matches multiple tensions: with 6 matches listed, each showing ID and desired state

evidence.stderr:
error: ambiguous prefix '01KJ' matches multiple tensions:
  01KJJH88CGTH12REE26SG6ZDAQ - write novel
  01KJJH8D2JTXMKB5SNAMKS9Q49 - write novel
  01KJJH8K1PPZ5NNVHV4VJX2FRE - parent task
  01KJJH8K338DAVV007Z5NVZ45Q - child task
  01KJJH8YEDA11GX44BP6FJ66JX - 写小说 🎵
  01KJJH94EMZGZT9ESAYQJXCJ4X - prefix test task

assertions.title: Show reports not found for invalid ID

steps.observed: error: tension not found: BOGUS123, exit code 1
error: tension not found: INVALIDID99999, exit code 1

steps.expected: Error indicating prefix too short, need at least 4
steps.observed: error: prefix too short: 'ABC' is 3 characters, need at least 4, exit code 1
error: prefix too short: 'A' is 1 characters, need at least 4, exit code 1
error: prefix too short: 'AB' is 2 characters, need at least 4, exit code 1

evidence.stderr: Clear error messages with character count and minimum required

frictions.description: werk tree command has a clap configuration bug - both --resolved and --released use short flag '-r', causing panic when tree is invoked

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All CRUD add/show functionality works correctly including ID/prefix resolution, validation, and unicode handling. One friction noted: tree command has clap short flag conflict between --resolved and --released.
